name: windows-arm-smoke-cli-output-v1
description: Deterministic artifact checks for comparing Windows ARM smoke tests against the full CLI version output.

success.description: Compares against the full CLI output string rather than only the bare package version.
Touches the Windows ARM smoke path.
Adds or updates regression tests for the smoke workflow output check.

partial.description: Touches version verification but may not cover both release-archive and npm-installed paths.
